posts.title: …people can’t be MADE American by a piece of paper.

twitter.content: I’m noticing a lot of foreigners who seem to not understand why we’d risk hundreds of lives, spend millions of dollars, and sacrifice several aircraft to rescue one guy. And the reason they don’t understand is also the reason people can’t be made American by a piece of paper.

twitter.content:
Karl Marx's body is in his grave, London.

But, if you travel to Christ's grave in Jerusalem, it's empty, & has been for 2,000 years.
